title: Note de l'ambassade britannique relative à l'adhésion à l'accord des territoires sous domination britannique : Chypre, Malte, Côte de l'Or, Somalie britannique, Palestine, Maurice, Etats malais fédérés, Trinidad, Malouines

pages.text:
Ambassado de Grande Bretagna on France

-'=-

His Majeaty's Embassy presents ita com-

pliments to the Ministan of Foreign Affairs, and has the honour, under instructions from His Majes ty's Principal Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs, to inform them, in accordance with Articlo 6 of the International Agroement

for the Creation

in Paria f an International Veterinary Bureau sim gned at Paris on January 25 the 1924, that the co- Tarmants of Cyprus, waita, the cold coast, Britiet.

Somaliland, palestine, Mauritius, the Federatad walay States, Irinidad and the Elkland iolands de sim re to accede to the above - mentioned International Agreement.

All these Goternmenta desire to be pla-

eed in the 6th category under article 11 of the

Statues annexed, to the Agreement.

His Majeety' a Embasey mould be gratoful if the ministry of Foreign Affairs would be so good as to notify the other governments signatory to tho Agreement of the desire of accesgion exuradsod by the above-mentioned Governments, in a0005dance with Article 6 of the Agreement

Paris July 13 th 1927
